# UiHostExtensionCapability.MimeTypes property

REQUIRED. The UI resource MIME types the host can render as interactive user interfaces. A host supporting this extension MUST include the exact string [`MimeType`](../UiResource/MimeType.md), matched verbatim and case-sensitively (§26.2).

```csharp
public IReadOnlyList<string> MimeTypes { get; set; }
```
